title: AD Taylor-tower P6: exact-coefficient towers (rational/bignum) for polynomial/rational functions
goal: Per docs/design/AD_TAYLOR_TOWER.md sec 9. Use the COEFF_RATIONAL coefficient-type flag (designed into the layout in P1) so high-order derivatives of polynomial/rational functions are BIT-EXACT, reusing Eshkol's rational/bignum dispatch (project_bignum_dispatch_pattern). Recurrences reused verbatim but multiply-accumulate dispatches through arith_->{mul,add,sub,div} instead of fma. Transcendentals demote to COEFF_F64 with a recorded flag; predicate taylor-exact? reports the regime. Exactness contagion matches Eshkol semantics.
acceptance: rational/bignum derivatives of x^p and p(x)/q(x) match a symbolic/bignum oracle BIT-FOR-BIT (not just 1e-12)
taylor-exact? predicate correct; transcendental demotion to F64 with flag
numeric_depth exactness-contagion suite extended with a taylor column PASS
campaign_payoff: Exact high-order derivatives -- an Eshkol-distinctive capability no double-only AD framework offers.
